examples: I eat an apple every day.,The apple is red.
I like bananas.,The banana is yellow.
The cat is sleeping.,I have a cute cat.
The dog is barking.,I love dogs.
The sun is bright.,I love the sunny day.
The moon is round tonight.,I saw the moon last night.
I read a book every day.,This is my favorite book.
My house has three rooms.,The house is beautiful.
I drink water every day.,The water is cold.
I drink milk in the morning.,The milk is fresh.
